items.title_en: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei could still be trying to make a deal with Pentagon
items.title_zh: Anthropic 仍寻求五角大楼合作
items.summary_en: Anthropic: CEO Dario Amodei is reportedly still trying to preserve a Pentagon partnership after internal talks over a federal sales team and military use cases broke down. The report says the company is balancing national-security business opportunities against internal opposition and reputational risk. The outcome of the negotiations remains unresolved. (TechCrunch)
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：在联邦销售团队和军事用途争议导致内部谈判破裂后，CEO Dario Amodei 据报仍在推动与五角大楼达成合作。报道显示，公司一边争取国家安全业务，一边处理内部反对意见与声誉风险，相关谈判仍未落定。（TechCrunch）

items.title_zh: 元象开源全球最大MoE多模态推理模型：成本仅为DeepSeek 1/7，Yuan3.0 Ultra
items.summary_zh: 元象：元象发布并开源 Yuan3.0 Ultra，多模态 MoE 推理模型主打图像理解与复杂推理。报道援引官方信息称，其推理成本约为同类方案的七分之一，模型已面向开发者开放。（量子位）

items.title_en: Lio bags a $30M Series A from Andreessen Horowitz to automate enterprise procurement
items.title_zh: Lio 获 3000 万美元 A 轮
items.summary_en: Lio: Enterprise procurement startup Lio raised a $30 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz. The company says its AI agents analyze purchasing data and automate sourcing workflows for large organizations, and it plans to use the new capital to expand product development and go-to-market operations. (TechCrunch)
items.summary_zh: Lio：企业采购自动化创业公司 Lio 完成由 Andreessen Horowitz 领投的 3000 万美元 A 轮融资。公司表示，其 AI Agent 可分析采购数据并自动化寻源流程，新资金将用于产品研发和市场扩张。（TechCrunch）

items.title_zh: 华为重金押注的世界模型公司，新融了10个亿！又一位技术女将从大厂“杀”出
items.summary_zh: 极佳视界：聚焦世界模型与空间智能的极佳视界完成约 10 亿元新融资。报道显示，公司获得产业资本持续押注，资金将用于模型研发、产品化和商业拓展，继续推进具身智能相关布局。（量子位）

items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI introduced GPT-5.4 as its newest flagship model for complex tasks and published a matching GPT-5.4 Thinking System Card. The release emphasizes stronger reasoning behavior and updated safety evaluations, with rollout across ChatGPT and API products. The system card details capability testing, risk areas, and mitigations for the new model. (Official)
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4，并同步公开 GPT-5.4 Thinking System Card。新模型面向复杂任务，强调更稳定的推理表现和更新后的安全评估，并通过 ChatGPT 与 API 渠道上线。系统卡披露了能力测试、风险点与缓解措施。（官方）

items.title_en: Build agents that run automatically in the background with Automations
items.summary_en: Cursor: Cursor launched Automations, a feature for running coding agents automatically in the background. The product lets users trigger recurring or event-driven workflows without keeping the editor open, extending Cursor from interactive assistance to unattended agent execution. The feature is positioned as part of Cursor's broader agent workflow stack. (Official)
items.summary_zh: Cursor：Cursor 推出 Automations，支持在后台自动运行编程 Agent。该功能可按周期或事件触发工作流，无需持续打开编辑器，进一步把 Cursor 从交互式助手扩展为可无人值守执行任务的 Agent 平台。（官方）
